author: gb9t
content: Iteration 45: net/bonding-team.md committed (a0a171d, 232 lines). Linux bond + team link aggregation. ~20K LOC. Defenses: LACPDU validation strict per IEEE spec, partner-verification (closes spoofed-partner attack from rogue switch), mode change atomic (closes CVE-2022-3625-class race), slave-list RCU-safe, ALB ARP-reply scoping (closes neighbor ARP rewrite), team BPF prog verification, slave promisc restoration on release (closes packet-sniffing class), bond-over-bond cycle detection. 45 docs / ~2.49M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/net/wireguard/ already covered; drivers/net/bridge/ would be a great pick — Linux bridge is in net/bridge/ not drivers/net so check there.
